raw.message: Classic Tetris Meets Modern Vibes: Dive In!

hook.summary: A high-energy UGC sequence of a person rushing home to play the game.
hook.visual_action: A young man enters his home, drops his bag, and dives onto his bed with a tablet in hand.
hook.text_overlay: POV: When I got home, I opened Tetris Block Party.

scene_flow: Live-action UGC of a person rushing home and jumping on a bed to play.
Gameplay footage showing high-score multipliers and colorful block clearing.
3D animation of a blue block character celebrating in a neon disco setting.
Final call-to-action screen with download links and search prompt.
on_screen_text: POV: When I got home, I opened Tetris Block Party.
Join PVP anytime and anywhere and play with friends
audience_proxy: Casual gamers and Tetris fans who enjoy competitive social play and high-energy visuals.
